mapper.select: /* PtnrPointMgmtMapper.getPtnrRateUsgHstInfo */ SELECT FN_GET_CODENM('CMN0073', PNT.PARTNER_ID) AS PARTNER_NM , PNT.BILL_YM , PNT.USG_YM , PNT.CONTRACT_NUM , PNT.SVC_CNTR_NO , PNT.RATE_CD , RAT.RATE_NM , FN_GET_CODENM('MSP0003',USG.SUB_STATUS) AS SUB_STATUS , USG.RATE_CD , USG.STRT_DT , USG.END_DT , USG.USG_DT_CNT , USG.USG_AMNT , FN_GET_CODENM('CMN0246', PNT.INSR_CD) AS INSR_NM FROM (SELECT A.PARTNER_ID ,A.BILL_YM ,CASE WHEN A.PARTNER_ID = 'googleplay' THEN TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(A.USG_YM,'YYYYMM'),-1),'YYYYMM') ELSE A.USG_YM END USG_YM ,A.CONTRACT_NUM ,A.SVC_CNTR_NO ,CASE WHEN (SELECT '1' FROM MSP_RATE_MST B WHERE B.RATE_CD = A.RATE_CD) = '1' THEN A.RATE_CD WHEN (SELECT '2' FROM MSP_PARTNER_PRMT_MST C WHERE C.PRMT_ID = A.RATE_CD) = '2' THEN (SELECT RATE_CD FROM MSP_PARTNER_PRMT_MST D WHERE D.PRMT_ID = A.RATE_CD) END RATE_CD ,A.INSR_CD FROM MSP_PARTNER_POINT_MST A WHERE A.RATE_CD = #{rateCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) PNT , MSP_RATE_MST RAT , MSP_CNTR_USG_INFO USG WHERE PNT.RATE_CD = RAT.RATE_CD AND PNT.USG_YM = USG.USG_YM AND PNT.CONTRACT_NUM = USG.CONTRACT_NUM AND PNT.SVC_CNTR_NO = USG.SVC_CNTR_NO AND PNT.RATE_CD = USG.RATE_CD AND PNT.BILL_YM = #{billYm, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND PNT.SVC_CNTR_NO = #{svcCntrNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY USG.END_DT DESC
